channel.title: Lc3 on Personal Site of Andrei N. Ciobanu
channel.description: Recent content in Lc3 on Personal Site of Andrei N. Ciobanu

item.title: Hash, displace, and compress: Perfect hashing with Java
item.description: This article explains a straightforward approach for generating Perfect Hash Functions, and using them in tandem with a Map<K,V> implementation called ReadOnlyMap<K,V>. It assumes the reader is already familiar with the concepts like hash functions and hash tables. If you want to refresh your knowledge on the two mentioned topics, I recommend you to read some of my previous articles: Implementing Hash Tables in C and A tale of Java Hash Tables.
